frame_eqs_str: a['decay']=1; a['zoom']=(0.95+(0.075*Math.max(a['treb_att'], (a['mid_att']+0.5)))); a['zoom']=Math.max(1.0001, a['zoom']); a['warp']=0; a['vol']=(((a['bass_att']+a['mid_att'])+a['treb_att'])*0.25); a['vol']=(a['vol']*a['vol']); a['mtime']=(a['mtime']+(a['vol']*0.1)); a['q1']=((a['mtime']*0.4)-(0.05*a['time'])); a['rot']=(Math.max(a['bass_att'], (a['mid_att']-0.5))*0.04);
